posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Did you know that since its new layout release in 2022, WorkForms has become an integral tool for teams conducting surveys and collecting data.
In this session, the co-founders of monday WorkForms explore the origins, the current landscape, and the WorkForm features coming soon.

To join the beta group for monday WorkForms, please sign up here.

You can also give the WorkForms team feedback about the webinar here.

Any questions for @Galit-monday.com or @Or about monday WorkForms? Ask below!
